active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The active finish-board row is still drmTMB#59 numerical-guard sensitivity. The ordinary q2 correlation-grid, structured q2 boundary, scale-side phylogenetic clamp-active, fixed-effect bivariate sigma1/sigma2 clamp-sensitivity, Student-t Wald calibration, and Student-t profile/bootstrap feasibility diagnostics are banked as diagnostic evidence only. The profile/bootstrap slice has 10 fixed-effect Student-t shape fits, minimum convergence 0.60, minimum pdHess 0.80, low-boundary nu profile ok rate 0.00, ordinary-nu profile ok rates 0.20-0.60, and all requested parametric-bootstrap intervals returning with 10 refits. Larger bivariate scale-route grids, larger guard grids, larger Student-t profile/bootstrap calibration, additional random-effect and structured correlation guard depth, larger scale-side grids, and broader intervals remain planned.
